name: cnv_gene_extractor
description: CNV segment table to per-sample amplification/deletion gene programs and GMT gene sets

inputs.name: segments_tsv
inputs.description: CNV segments table (TSV/TSV.GZ) with chromosome, start, end, and amplitude columns

inputs.name: gtf
inputs.description: Gene annotation used to map segment overlap to gene bodies

inputs.name: purity_tsv
inputs.description: Optional sample purity table used for amplitude correction

parameters.name: dataset_label
parameters.help: Optional dataset label written to metadata

parameters.name: sample_id_column
parameters.help: Sample id column (defaults to sample1 when absent)

parameters.name: segments_format
parameters.help: Segment format preset for column autodetection

parameters.name: chrom_prefix_mode
parameters.help: Chromosome prefix handling before GTF matching

parameters.name: use_purity_correction
parameters.help: Apply amplitude/purity correction when purity values are available

parameters.name: purity_floor
parameters.help: Lower bound used in purity correction denominator

parameters.name: min_abs_amplitude
parameters.help: Drop segments with abs(amplitude) below this threshold

parameters.name: max_segment_length_bp
parameters.help: Optional hard cap on segment length after coordinate normalization (0 disables)

parameters.name: focal_length_scale_bp
parameters.help: Focal penalty length scale in base pairs

parameters.name: gene_count_penalty
parameters.help: Penalty as function of genes hit per segment

parameters.name: aggregation
parameters.help: Aggregation from segment contributions to gene score

parameters.name: program_preset
parameters.help: CNV program preset controlling emitted program types

parameters.name: gmt_require_symbol
parameters.help: Require non-empty symbol tokens in GMT

parameters.name: emit_small_gene_sets
parameters.help: Emit sets below gmt_min_genes with warning

parameters.name: emit_cohort_sets
parameters.help: Emit optional cohort-level recurrent amp/del gene sets

parameters.name: cohort_score_threshold
parameters.help: Score threshold for per-sample recurrence counting

parameters.name: cohort_min_fraction
parameters.help: Minimum recurrence fraction to retain gene for cohort ranking

parameters.name: cohort_min_samples
parameters.help: Minimum samples required before cohort sets are emitted

outputs.name: manifest.tsv
outputs.description: Grouped manifest with one row per sample/program output directory

outputs.name: cnv_program_manifest.tsv
outputs.description: Flat per-sample/program QC manifest including emitted and skipped program rows

outputs.name: cohort/genesets.gmt
outputs.description: Optional cohort recurrence GMT output when emit_cohort_sets=true
